---
pagetitle: "Contact us"
---

::: grid
::: {#about_banner .g-col-12 .title}
# Contact Us
:::

::: {.g-col-6 .text_block}
### Contact Us    

For inquiries regarding our programs, collaborations, or any additional information, please feel free to reach out to us via email at [matin_nuhamunada@ugm.ac.id](mailto:matin_nuhamunada@ugm.ac.id).

<small>
**[UNIVERSITAS GADJAH MADA](https://ugm.ac.id/)**  
**[Faculty of Biology](https://biologi.ugm.ac.id/en/)**  
Jalan Teknika Selatan, Sekip Utara  
Yogyakarta 55281, Indonesia  
</small>
:::

::: {.g-col-6 .img_margin}
<div style="margin: 1rem 0;">
<iframe width="100%" height="450" frameborder="0" scrolling="no" marginheight="0" marginwidth="0"
   src="https://www.openstreetmap.org/export/embed.html?bbox=110.3749%2C-7.7671%2C110.3779%2C-7.7661&layer=mapnik&marker=-7.766606%2C110.376385"></iframe>
 <p><a href="https://www.openstreetmap.org/#map=19/-7.766606/110.376385" target="_blank" rel="noopener">View a larger map</a></p>
</div>
:::

<div></div>
:::
